title: eryngium glossophyllum
intro: Eryngium glossophyllum, also known as the blue devil, is a plant species that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Eryngium glossophyllum include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
